description: Blank standard-skill workspace copied into every new SpatialSkillGrowth run.

problem_classes.name: metric_dimension_scaling
problem_classes.title: Metric Dimension Scaling
problem_classes.description: Transfer a known length, width, height, radius, or size to another target using image geometry.

problem_classes.name: metric_distance_scaling
problem_classes.title: Metric Distance Scaling
problem_classes.description: Calibrate target depth or inter-object distance from a supplied metric reference and unit.

problem_classes.name: dimension_ratio
problem_classes.title: Dimension Ratio
problem_classes.description: Compare lengths, widths, heights, areas, or dimension expressions as a numeric ratio or difference.

problem_classes.name: volume_capacity
problem_classes.title: Volume Capacity
problem_classes.description: Reason about 3D volume ratios and capacity rather than visible instance counts.

problem_classes.name: linear_fit_stacking
problem_classes.title: Linear Fit and Stacking
problem_classes.description: Compute how many repeated dimensions are needed to match a requested length, width, height, or area.

problem_classes.name: object_counting
problem_classes.title: Object Counting
problem_classes.description: Count visible objects, parts, or instances with any inclusion and exclusion constraints.

problem_classes.name: count_arithmetic
problem_classes.title: Count Arithmetic
problem_classes.description: Count multiple groups and apply deterministic arithmetic to their counts.

problem_classes.name: count_comparison
problem_classes.title: Count Comparison
problem_classes.description: Determine which group has more, fewer, the same number, or enough instances.

problem_classes.name: depth_ordering
problem_classes.title: Depth Ordering
problem_classes.description: Determine which target is closer, farther, nearest, or furthest in 3D.

problem_classes.name: depth_filtered_counting
problem_classes.title: Depth-filtered Counting
problem_classes.description: Count targets that are in front of, behind, closer than, or farther than a reference.

problem_classes.name: compass_direction
problem_classes.title: Egocentric Compass Direction
problem_classes.description: Resolve N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, or NW from the supplied observer position and facing direction.

problem_classes.name: occlusion_visibility
problem_classes.title: Occlusion and Visibility
problem_classes.description: Determine whether a target remains visible or becomes covered after a hypothetical placement.

problem_classes.name: physical_interaction
problem_classes.title: Physical Interaction
problem_classes.description: Reason about falling, hitting, pushing, tipping, hanging over an edge, or collision order.

problem_classes.name: size_fit_comparison
problem_classes.title: Size and Fit Comparison
problem_classes.description: Compare dimensions or decide whether one object fits on, under, inside, or across another.

problem_classes.name: relative_3d_position
problem_classes.title: Relative 3D Position
problem_classes.description: Resolve above, below, left, right, inside, on, under, adjacency, or elevation relations.

problem_classes.name: visual_attribute_recognition
problem_classes.title: Visual Attribute Recognition
problem_classes.description: Answer residual Omni3D visual attribute and object-identification questions that are not geometric operations.
